text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On nights of the new moon, Admire Vega never
fails to go out to see the stars in order to speak
with her deceased sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each time, she reaffirms her vow to the sister she
races for—to whom she will dedicate all the
honors she earns.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she believes she's alone in this quest, I'm
here doing my best to ensure that she isn't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our relationship may still be rocky, but the
Twinkles Series waits for no one. We set our
sights on preparing for her debut.
